core_mechanism: steepest-descent (saddle-point) asymptotic analysis of an exact Fredholm-determinant / Tracy-Widom distribution formula for an exactly-solvable discrete stochastic model, taken in a weak-coupling scaling limit, yielding a one-parameter family of crossover distributions that interpolate between a Gaussian and a Tracy-Widom (GUE) limiting law
brief_reason: The abstract derives explicit crossover distributions interpolating between a small-time Gaussian and a large-time GUE Tracy-Widom law via a rigorous steepest-descent analysis of the exact Tracy-Widom formula for asymmetric exclusion, which converges to the continuum equation in a weakly asymmetric scaling limit.
